all_repos.name: catchorg/Catch2
all_repos.description: A modern, C++-native, test framework for unit-tests, TDD and BDD - using C++14, C++17 and later (C++11 support is in v2.x branch, and C++03 on the Catch1.x branch)

all_repos.name: davila7/claude-code-templates
all_repos.description: CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code

all_repos.name: google-labs-code/stitch-skills
all_repos.description: A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.

all_repos.name: hashicorp/terraform
all_repos.description: Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.

all_repos.name: zeux/meshoptimizer
all_repos.description: Mesh optimization library that makes meshes smaller and faster to render

all_repos.name: wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
all_repos.description: This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities

all_repos.name: oven-sh/bun
all_repos.description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one
